generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingDimmerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator component controlling lighting intensity within the building, modeled in BIM with embedded control logic and configured via model-driven deployment framework for bidirectional communication with the Digital Twin through Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware."
]

instance HVACValveController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller component managing HVAC system operations, embedded with BIM-based control logic and integrated through standardized interfaces for real-time command execution from the Digital Twin via Eclipse Ditto platform."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting system implementing adaptive control algorithms, configured through BIM model transformations and deployed with reinforcement learning capabilities for energy optimization via Unreal Engine plugins."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-based occupancy sensor deployed in building spaces to detect presence, transmitting real-time occupancy data via MQTT protocol to Eclipse Hono ingestion layer."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Photometric sensor measuring ambient light levels, configured in BIM model and transmitting real-time lux measurements through Eclipse Hono middleware to Ditto platform."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataStream
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor monitoring temperature and humidity levels, embedded with BIM metadata and transmitting calibrated readings via MQTT to Eclipse Ditto for unified data management."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataStream
]

instance EnergyMonitoringSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building energy consumption sensor tracking electrical usage patterns, integrated with BIM model and transmitting real-time energy data streams to Ditto platform via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMonitoringSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-enriched model containing embedded control logic for building systems (lighting, HVAC), validated for runtime compatibility and transformed via MDE frameworks into deployable artifacts for Eclipse Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework
]

instance BuildingPhysicalGeometryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically rich BIM model containing geometric, spatial, and functional data of building infrastructure, extended with operational data layers for unified digital representation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance SensorConfigurationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-derived model containing sensor metadata (IDs, endpoints, protocols) automatically mapped to runtime interfaces for seamless integration with Eclipse Hono/Ditto platforms."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoIngestion
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data stream processed from IoT sensors, enriched with temporal patterns and integrated with BIM-based spatial context for analytics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoPlatform
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed environmental data combining temperature, humidity, and light level measurements with BIM spatial references for occupancy-based climate control optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AdaptiveControlService
]

instance EnergyPerformanceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Building energy consumption data integrated with operational schedules and weather data, processed for real-time monitoring and predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnergyManagementService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance RevitBIMTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Revit platform used for modeling physical assets and embedding control logic within BIM models, serving as the primary modeling environment for the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMControlLogicModel, BuildingPhysicalGeometryModel
]

instance EclipseHonoIngestion : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware layer providing real-time telemetry ingestion for IoT sensor data via MQTT protocols, acting as the initial processing point for physical-to-virtual data streams."
    DTDFVocab:enables SensorConfigurationModel
]

instance EclipseDittoPlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified data management platform enabling bidirectional communication between physical systems and Digital Twin, handling device configurations and runtime data synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:enables OccupancyData, EnvironmentalConditionsData, EnergyPerformanceData
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MDE framework automating the generation of runtime artifacts from BIM models, including Ditto device configurations and Unreal Engine plugins for visualization."
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMControlLogicModel
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing interactive 3D visualization and simulation capabilities for immersive Digital Twin monitoring and decision support."
    DTDFVocab:enables BuildingPhysicalGeometryModel
]

instance CustomEnergyAnalyticsPlugin : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom plugin extending Digital Twin functionality with specialized energy analytics capabilities, integrated via standardized extension points in the Ditto platform."
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyManagementService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time monitoring of building operational parameters through unified data streams processed by Eclipse Ditto platform."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingOperationalInsight
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service identifying potential sensor/actuator failures and performance degradation through machine learning models trained on historical data streams."
    DTDFVocab:provides EquipmentFailureAlerts
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based service optimizing building control systems (lighting, HVAC) for energy efficiency while maintaining occupant comfort and health."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlPolicyAdjustments, OccupantComfortOptimization
]

instance EnergyManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service tracking and analyzing building energy consumption patterns, providing recommendations for energy savings and carbon footprint reduction."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionReports
]

instance VisualDecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service enabling facility managers to assess building performance through immersive Unreal Engine simulations and interactive data exploration."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceVisualization
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingOperationalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational insights combining sensor data with BIM spatial context to provide comprehensive building performance overview for facility managers."
]

instance EquipmentFailureAlerts : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive alerts identifying potential equipment failures based on anomaly detection in sensor data streams and historical performance patterns."
]

instance ControlPolicyAdjustments : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to building control policies (lighting schedules, HVAC setpoints) based on reinforcement learning optimization algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendations : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Suggested maintenance actions for building systems based on predictive maintenance analysis, including scheduled inspections and component replacements."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnergyConsumptionReports : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detailed reports analyzing building energy consumption patterns, identifying inefficiencies and opportunities for energy savings."
]

instance OccupantComfortOptimization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustments to environmental conditions (lighting, temperature) to optimize occupant comfort while maintaining energy efficiency targets."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PerformanceVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representations of building performance metrics and operational data for decision support and analysis."
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical and virtual environment encompassing the building infrastructure including all sensors, actuators, and control systems within the Digital Twin constellation."
    base:contains LightingDimmerActuator, HVACValveController, OccupancySensor, LightLevelSensor, TemperatureHumiditySensor, EnergyMonitoringSensor, AdaptiveLightingSystem
]

// C12: Component Relationships
instance BIMModelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Core BIM model containing geometric, spatial, and functional data serving as the foundational representation for the Digital Twin."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance RuntimeDataProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component handling real-time data processing including ingestion, validation, and transformation of sensor data streams for Digital Twin operations."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment EclipseHonoIngestion, EclipseDittoPlatform
]

instance VisualizationSimulationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component providing 3D visualization and simulation capabilities through Unreal Engine integration for immersive Digital Twin monitoring."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance ServiceExecutionComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component executing Digital Twin services including monitoring, predictive analytics, and adaptive control operations."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment AdaptiveControlService, PredictiveMaintenanceService, EnergyManagementService, VisualDecisionSupportService
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Digital Twin system representing building infrastructure with integrated physical-to-virtual interaction and model-driven operations."
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is enabled via **bidirectional control logic** generated from BIM models and deployed through the framework. The DT processes inputs (e.g., occupancy data) to generate control signals (e.g., lighting adjustments) and transmits them back to actuators via the same middleware stack (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). This interaction is automated through **model-to-text transformations**, where BIM-based control semantics are translated into executable runtime artifacts (e.g., RESTful APIs or IoT device commands)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time**, with **low-latency synchronization** between physical and virtual systems to ensure operational relevance. The framework emphasizes **live data ingestion** and **immediate processing** of sensor inputs, enabling **sub-second latency** for critical control actions (e.g., emergency responses, adaptive lighting adjustments). The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the **real-time fidelity** of the DT, quantifying how closely the virtual representation aligns with the physical asset’s current state."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Core**: The semantic backbone for physical asset representation.
   - **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange and device management.
   - **Runtime Engine**: Hosts generated interfaces (e.g., APIs, IoT bindings) and executes control logic.
   - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring and simulation.
   - **Extension Points**: Standardized interfaces for integrating third-party services (e.g., analytics, AI models). The constellation is deployed as a **modular, scalable platform** with clear separation of concerns between components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **multiple life cycle stages**, including:
   - **Design phase**: BIM models are enriched with device configurations and control logic.
   - **Construction phase**: Physical sensors/actuators are deployed, and BIM data is validated for runtime compatibility.
   - **Operation phase**: The DT enables real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control.
   - **Refurbishment phase**: The DT supports retrofitting and upgrades by integrating new sensor/actuator data into the BIM model. The framework ensures continuity across stages via **model-driven transformations** and **runtime configuration management**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Model Validation**: Verification of the BIM model’s compliance with deployment requirements before transformation.
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) Metric**: Quantitative evaluation of the DT’s synchronization with the physical system, measuring **semantic coherence** and **real-time accuracy**.
   - **Synchronization Techniques**: Mechanisms to mitigate **semantic drift** (as referenced in related work) and ensure continuous alignment between the DT and physical asset. The framework does not explicitly detail **uncertainty handling** or **error correction mechanisms**, but emphasizes **validation-driven deployment** and **real-time synchronization**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT’s technical connection is established via **Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware**, which provide **real-time data exchange** and **bidirectional communication** between the physical system and the DT. The framework leverages **standardized protocols** (implicitly referenced in the context of middleware integration) to ensure seamless interoperability. While specific protocols like **MQTT or REST** are not explicitly mentioned, the middleware’s role in enabling **live synchronization** and **control signal transmission** is central to the DT’s technical connection."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **scalable, modular architecture** with **standardized extension points**, enabling both **centralized and decentralized hosting** configurations. The framework supports **cloud-based or on-premise deployment** (implied by scalability requirements) and ensures **low-overhead updates** for maintainability. The deployment process is automated through **model-driven transformations**, reducing manual intervention and enabling **reproducible DT setups** across projects."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT framework supports **horizontal integration** with **heterogeneous systems** through:
   - **Standardized integration frameworks** for interoperability with **Building Control Systems (BCS)** and other operational platforms.
   - **Modular service architecture** enabling seamless communication with external systems (e.g., IoT platforms, analytics tools).
   The framework does not explicitly mention **Building Management Systems (BMS)** or **Energy Management Systems (EMS)**, but emphasizes **interoperability** with domain-specific systems via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, particularly **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, which provides the **semantic foundation** for modeling physical assets. While specific standards (e.g., IFC, COBie) are not explicitly listed, the framework leverages **BIM’s structured data models** to ensure **interoperability and consistency** across deployment phases. The use of **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** aligns with **open-source, standardized middleware protocols**, though detailed compliance with additional protocols (e.g., MQTT, OPC UA) is not provided."
]
